mentions.note: Housing stock rallying after mass downgrades; supply arriving to quell demand; home prices coming down to 2019 levels in many markets; group leader.
Homebuilder down 3.4%; downgrade of whole group; housing market weakness.
High-end home builder struggling in rising rate environment; very tough to own when rates climbing; down less than peers but fundamentals challenged.
Luxury home builder with strong execution under CEO Doug Yearley; 20%+ cash buyer base insulates from mortgage rate sensitivity; preferred home builder choice.
Only home builder that can handle high-rate environment; 25% of homes bought with cash insulates from mortgage rate pressure. Only one that can handle the situation.
